rationale: All required content is present and correct: '2025 Revenue ($M)' bold white title, four #5B8CFF bars with rounded tops on a thin baseline, muted Q1-Q4 labels, and value labels (8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0) that visibly count up (7.9/8.4/9.7/10.4 at the 25% still) while riding the bar tops. The filmstrip shows the intended choreography: black start, title fade-in, left-to-right staggered bar growth with decelerating feel (tile 4 shows Q1 ahead of Q2 ahead of Q3), a long hold, then a unified fade; the one deviation is that the final frame is still ~20-30% visible rather than fully faded out by 6.0s. Composition is clean and proportional with consistent spacing and centered labels, nothing clipped. A faint single-pixel artifact in the first frame is negligible; otherwise it is essentially shippable after touching up the fade-out endpoint.
